channel.title: The Mutapa Times — Zimbabwe Stories
channel.description: Packed Instagram-Story autolist — business, property, jobs and internships in one feed. Each item ships with a 1080×1920 story card and a 'Read more on Mutapa Times' CTA.

item.title: Econet Wireless Zimbabwe Posts Profit Turnaround, Revenue Rises to ZWG 22.2 Billion @econetzimbabwe
item.description: via TechAfrica News #Zimbabwe #Tech #AfricaTech #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: TechAfrica News

item.title: Shocking Details Emerge: Mutare Nightclub Breastfeeding Mother Brutally Beaten to Death by Her ‘Ben 10’ Husband
item.description: A Life Extinguished: The Tragic Cost of Domestic Violence in Mutare Mutare – In a harrowing incident that has cast a long shadow over the Chikanga neighbourhood of Mutare, a 41-year-old woman, Samantha Chuma, has died following a brutal assault allegedly perpetrated by her husban via My Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: My Zimbabwe News

item.title: Zimbabweans in Cape Town seek repatriation @bulawayo24
item.description: Hundreds of Zimbabwean nationals have gathered outside Zimbabwe’s consulate in Cape Town, pleading with authorities to assist them in returning home amid growing fears of xenophobic violence and mount... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Kenya denies awarding $1.2-billion airport expansion contract to controversial businessman Chivayo @wicknellchivayo
item.description: TRT Afrika Kenya has denied that a company linked to controversial Zimbabwean businessman Wicknell Chivayo has won a multi-billion-US-dollar contract to expand the country’s main airport, Jomo Kenyatta International Airport (JKIA), in the capital Nairobi. This follows earlier rep via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: The rise, fall and resilience of Siqokoqela Mphoko: A liberation son’s long fight for dignity @bulawayo24
item.description: To understand Siqokoqela Mphoko, one must begin where he begins — in the shadows of the liberation struggle, where childhood memories were shaped by whispered news of comrades who never returned. Born... via Bulawayo24 News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Bulawayo24 News

item.title: Rebate for SA ‘xenophobia returnees’ @zimsituation
item.description: Source: Rebate for SA ‘xenophobia returnees’ -Newsday Zimbabwe ZIMBABWEANS returning back to the country in the wake of renewed xenophobic attacks against foreigners in South Africa will benefit from an immigrants rebate that will allow them to bring into the country personal eff via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: 1 200 Malawians, 400 Zimbabweans leave SA @zimsituation
item.description: Source: 1 200 Malawians, 400 Zimbabweans leave SA – herald South Africa’s Commissioner of the Border Management Authority (BMA), Dr Michael Masiapato, said they processed a total of 1 596 Malawian and Zimbabwean nationals during an intensive 13-hour operation at Beitbridge Port o via Zimbabwe Situation #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe Situation

item.title: Rule of Law or Chameleon Law?
item.description: By Brilliant Pongo Zimbabwe often speaks proudly about being governed by the rule of law. It is a phrase frequently... Continue reading "Rule of Law or Chameleon Law?" via Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Zimbabwe News

item.title: Strike casts shadow over Battle of Zimbabwe
item.description: SPORTS WRITER THE strike by Highland­ers players ahead of the Battle of Zimbabwe has cast a shadow over the highly-anticipated Castle Lager... To access this content, please purchase a subscription by clicking the button below and select a package of your choice! Subscriptions via Dailynews #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: Dailynews

item.title: Zimbabwe cuts rates first globally after US-Iran peace deal
item.description: Bloomberg Zimbabwe’s central bank became the first in the world to cut interest rates after the US and Iran said they reached an interim peace deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, an announcement that drove down oil prices. The monetary policy committee lowered the benchmark inte via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Unvalidated title deeds may not be recognised in future transactions – says Registrar
item.description: Chief Registrar of the Department of Deeds, Companies and Intellectual Property, Willie Mushayi, has urged property owners to validate and securitise their title deeds, saying the programme is intended to safeguard property rights and strengthen the integrity of Zimbabwe’s land r via The Zimbabwe News #Zimbabwe #Business #ZimbabweEconomy #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Zimbabwe News

item.title: Junior Social Media Assistant — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Help grow our social channels. Pitch fresh formats and ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Editorial Coordinator — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Pitch, draft and edit original explainers. Bring fresh editorial angles. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times

item.title: Junior Data Analyst — The Mutapa Times (Remote · 3 days/week · 3 months)
item.description: Turn Zimbabwe public data into clear visual stories. Bring new data ideas. Fully remote, 3 days/week, 3 months. Rolling intake. #Zimbabwe #Jobs #ZimbabweJobs #Hiring #ZimbabweNews
item.dc:creator: The Mutapa Times
